/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -rdynamic -O0 -ggdb -std=c++11 -Wall -Wno-deprecated -Werror -Wno-unused-function -Wno-builtin-macro-redefined -Wno-deprecated-declarations -shared -Wl,-soname,libsylar.so -o libsylar.so CMakeFiles/sylar.dir/http/http.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sylar.dir/http/http_connection.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sylar.dir/http/http_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sylar.dir/http/http_server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sylar.dir/http/http_session.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sylar.dir/http/servlet.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sylar.dir/http/servlets/config_servlet.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sylar.dir/http/servlets/status_servlet.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sylar.dir/http/ws_connection.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sylar.dir/http/ws_server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sylar.dir/http/ws_servlet.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sylar.dir/http/ws_session.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sylar.dir/src/address.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sylar.dir/src/application.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sylar.dir/src/bytearray.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sylar.dir/src/config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sylar.dir/src/daemon.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sylar.dir/src/db/fox_thread.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sylar.dir/src/db/mysql.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sylar.dir/src/db/redis.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sylar.dir/src/db/sqlite3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sylar.dir/src/email/email.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sylar.dir/src/email/smtp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sylar.dir/src/env.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sylar.dir/src/fd_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sylar.dir/src/fiber.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sylar.dir/src/hook.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sylar.dir/src/iomanager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sylar.dir/src/library.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sylar.dir/src/log.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sylar.dir/src/moudle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sylar.dir/src/mutex.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sylar.dir/src/scheduler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sylar.dir/src/socket.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sylar.dir/src/stream.cpp.o
